name: Nwando's Event Hall
description: Welcome to Nwando's Event Hall, the perfect venue for your next gathering! Our hall features a stunning gallery space that adds an elegant touch to any event. With a capacity of 400 to 500 guests, our spacious hall is ideal for seminars, conferences, parties, and celebratory events. From formal meetings to joyous celebrations, the environment is welcoming and adaptable to your specific needs.
